results.name: build_adl_candidate_set
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: init via adl_init_user_position_iterators then loop folds AdlIterEntry rows into candidate_root using discriminant/direction_byte/asset_idx/positions/orders.

results.name: compute_margin_requirement_by_mode
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: region [0,2,4] accepted; full body covers price validation, mode switch divisor, dual disc-path output writes.

regions.note: Entry: load oracle.price/flags/source, multiply by position.coin_idx, validate price via oracle_price_type_validate using position.kind

results.name: compute_user_margin_and_shortfall
results.rationale: whole-fn-override:already validated perfect=True with 19 vars bound; body is the 4-accumulator cross-margin walk - prologue reads account_equity, btree iter applies per-position deltas with mkt px, result writes via sret. Remaining MIR-level diffs are wrapping_add temp aliasing noise, not real flow gaps.

results.name: compute_adl_ranking_score
results.rationale: 3-arg signer signature; body models market lookup, user btree-driven position, and clamp(margin_ratio)*clamp(profit_ratio) ADL formula visible in the final SIMD ops; prologue region [0,2,4] accepted separately.

regions.note: prologue: market lookup; bounds-checked index into markets[] yields oracle/entry/result for this market

results.name: clearinghouse_adl_orchestrator
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: validator returned perfect=True with rust_over guidance only; fn loops over ADL margin entries, threshold-filters shortfalls, accumulates fills per asset into BTreeMap keyed by asset_idx — minimal idiomatic body using only HLIL var names.

results.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
results.rationale: Sibling baseline already validated as perfect=True; all locals bound to HLIL vars and structure mirrors the binary's three-arm liquidation flow.
